      [$[x_1,x_2]=x_3, thick [x_1,x_3]=x_4, thick [x_1,x_6]=-x_1, thick [x_2,x_6]=-a x_2,$ \

content.text: Final score: overall=54.4 (up from 36.1 baseline). Key improvements: 3/3 pages matching, Table 1 sized to approximate resizebox scaling (~16pt), Table 2 at 8pt with proper structure. Content=93.4, layout=53.8, typography=80.1. Raster remains low (13.5) due to inherent difficulty matching pixel-level positions without visual feedback.
